sc001_qc_status.checked_scope: SC001 opening upstream asset readiness after user feedback on black-wall readability
sc001_qc_status.rejection_reason: Reject current output: face, age impression, beard/hair, and identity do not match global Xue Linqiang master C004; costume also collapses into wall-grey with poor scene contrast.
required_changes: Must use assets/characters/c004m.png as hard identity reference, not text-only generation.
Preserve C004 face shape, black hair/topknot, short beard/stubble, age impression, body proportions, stance, and worn wall-master movement habits.
Episode state may add snow, cracked hands, wall grime, heavier scarf, and frozen wear, but must not turn him into a white-haired old man or different face.

Increase separation from black-stone wall: keep dark wall-worker base but add readable warm brown leather bindings, old iron rim highlights, bone/tan tool toggles, muted rust-red cord/patch accents, and frost edge highlights.
Silhouette must read against L007 black-stone wall at thumbnail size; avoid all-over mid-grey clothing.
qc_gate: At thumbnail distance, the character or group must separate from L007 black stone wall and gray blizzard.
Readable separation must come from large value/color blocks and rim light, not only tiny costume details.
Identity/template inheritance must still match the global master/template reference.
Do not generate SC001 reference frames until this second-pass candidate is user-approved.

notes: Second readability pass restores black-haired/topknot Xue Linqiang identity from C004 master.
Adds larger ash scarf, rust-red waist/sash, bone charm, warm leather, iron edge scratches, and snow rim to separate against black stone wall.

sc001_qc_status.user_confirmation: User confirmed all three second-pass character assets pass and requested generation of four SC001 reference frames.

sc001_qc_status.checked_scope: SC001 opening upstream asset readiness after user feedback on black-wall readability
sc001_qc_status.rejection_reason: Reject current output for SC001 use: northern siege figures are almost all grey and risk merging into L007 black-stone wall/blizzard background as unreadable silhouettes.
required_changes: Use assets/characters/c020m.png as hard template reference for species, body scale, equipment, and siege roles.

Keep northern attackers as local pressure silhouettes, but separate forms with controlled contrast: snow-rim highlights, dark iron shapes, dull bone/horn edges, wet leather browns, muted blood-rust cloth tags, and cold blue shadow separation.
Maintain multiple readable categories: black-tooth axe fighters, wolf riders, and mammoth/giant horn pressure must not collapse into one grey mass.
Design for later placement near black wall and storm: each figure group must remain legible at thumbnail size against black stone, snow, and smoke.
qc_gate: At thumbnail distance, the character or group must separate from L007 black stone wall and gray blizzard.
Readable separation must come from large value/color blocks and rim light, not only tiny costume details.
Identity/template inheritance must still match the global master/template reference.
Do not generate SC001 reference frames until this second-pass candidate is user-approved.

notes: Second readability pass uses large dirty-ivory fur, pale shields, bone/antler masks, light wolf fur, rust cloth, and torch/snow back separation.
Scene preview panels are included to check that raiders do not collapse into black-wall silhouettes.

sc001_qc_status.user_confirmation: User confirmed all three second-pass character assets pass and requested generation of four SC001 reference frames.

sc003_highscore_qc.note: 高分通过：红线主叙事、雨夜南方图桌、藤桥/湿石空间和纸线铜木水材质层次完整。
sc003_highscore_qc.lighting_note: 低位油灯暖侧光擦纸面、红线、铜钉和湿木；右上冷雨反光只点水滴与油布。

director_room_review.notes: 顾怀章与遮面晏南枝在图桌两侧对峙成立，暖油灯与月白玉片冷反光成立；红线政治边界可在最终生成中再稍强化。
director_room_review.lighting_note: 顾怀章吃左侧暖侧光；晏南枝只吃玉片窄冷反光，勾指节、面纱边和下颌线。

sc003_redo_qc.note: 通过：顾怀章/晏南枝对峙、暖灯/冷雨分区和红线关系成立；视频阶段需压低玉片亮度。

sc003_highscore_qc.note: 高分通过：红线成为顾怀章与晏南枝之间的权力边界，玉片降为次级窄冷边。
sc003_highscore_qc.lighting_note: 顾怀章保持暖侧光，晏南枝只吃窄冷边；玉片亮度不可超过红线和顾怀章压图手。

director_room_review.notes: 半卷血牒、推卷手和未接指尖成立；但空隙偏大，红线未足够清楚成为被推过的边界，玉片高光偏法器星芒，晏南枝衣料有白纱化连续性风险。
director_room_review.lighting_note: 左侧低位油灯窄侧光掠血牒，突出破损纸纤维、潮痕、旧蜡封和暗红旧印；右后方月白玉片只给指尖一条冷边。

sc003_redo_qc.note: 通过：血牒、红线、指尖停顿和未接触空隙构成清楚动作因果，旧蜡封和潮湿纸面材质成立。
sc003_redo_qc.lighting_note: 让暖光到冷光交界落在红线与未接触空隙处；血牒只吃侧光显材质，不能圣旨化发光。

sc003_highscore_qc.note: 高分通过：血牒越过红线、指尖停住和一指空隙构成清楚动作因果，纸蜡手水材质充分。
sc003_highscore_qc.lighting_note: 暖冷交界落在红线与未接触空隙处；血牒不发光、不漂浮。
